label: AppleScript • live verbatim single literal
query: Set the body of the note 'Draft' to the provided content.
notes: Capability lane: the real 16B model proposes the script; a mock 'app world' answers so there are no OS side effects. Scores that the model USED the {{content}} placeholder (proven from the pre-expansion proposal, so it did not re-type the literal) and that the script correctly sets the note body (Grok rubric). Skips when no AppleScript model is installed.

appleScript.content:
Q3 retro notes:
- Shipped the on-device runtime
- Cut cold-start by 40%
- Next: streaming tools
rubric: The AppleScript sets the body of the note named 'Draft' to the provided content.
The script targets the Notes application and does not delete or create unrelated items.
